## 服务关系


[图片1: null]


## 1 配置说明


- 天舟云只需要配置必要的配置，多个服务公用一个即可，如有项目独有的，可以自定义个namespace配置即可
- legox仅展示新增的配置项


### 1.1 天舟云配置说明


```
# 数据库配置，必须配置成自己的
spring.datasource.url = jdbc:postgresql://t-dbsec-postgres.gz.cvte.cn:11000/pguat_scm
spring.datasource.username = scm
spring.datasource.password = XXXXXX
spring.datasource.driver-class-name = org.postgresql.Driver
#Redis连接，建议配置成自己的
spring.redis.host = redis-fat001.gz.cvte.cn
spring.redis.password = XXXXX
spring.redis.port = 6379
spring.redis.database = 9
# IAC配置，必须配置成自己的
csb.iac.appId = 15d22276-a397-4f24-bcea-XXXXXX
csb.iac.appSecret = d96deb81-358e-481b-XXXXXX
csb.iac.systemId = 1206b5b9-1c37-45c6-8ed0-XXXXX
csb.iac.tenantId = 93caaf4e-478e-4026-a87d-XXXXXXX
# 服务名，必须配置成自己的
lcp.hub.application.name = scm-lcp-hub
lcp.app.application.name = scm-lcp-app
lcp.data.application.name = scm-lcp-data
csb.legox.application.name = scm-bsm
# 流水号使用公共的，建议使用自己的
csb.serial.feignName = csb-legox/legox
# 队列，使用低代码的MQ使用不同的队列
itemtoes.queue.name = scm-lcpSearchPushItemToEsQueue

#域名配置，域名转发必须一致，都是/hub /app /data，域名改成自己的
lcp.core.url = https://scm-buat-api.gz.cvte.cn/app
lcp.data.url = https://scm-buat-api.gz.cvte.cn/data
lcp.hub.url = https://scm-buat-api.gz.cvte.cn/hub
# bsm csb legox后台访问地址
service.csb.url = https://scm-buat-api.gz.cvte.cn
service.csb.gw.url = https://csbuat-gw.gz.cvte.cn
#流水号地址，如果需要使用自己的需要修改,多租户版本使用https://csbsit-admin.gz.cvte.cn/legox，单租户使用
service.csno.url = https://csbsit-admin.gz.cvte.cn/legox 或者 https://csbsit-api.gz.cvte.cn/csno
# 产品线标识，改成自己的
lcp.log.prodLine = scm
```


### 1.2 csb-legox配置


#### namespace: application


```
#组织同步使用,不开启
cvte.4a.info = AUTH_CSB
cvte.4a.key = XXXX
cvte.4a.user = AUTH_CSB
cvte.4a.secretKey = XXXX
csb.mybatis.xmlLocation = classpath*:mapper/oracle/*.xml,classpath*:mapper/*.xml
csb.import.file.store.path = /csb/store/import
csb.import.vtor.task.threadHold = 500
csb.import.vtor.task.thread = 16
#需申请
csb.iac.appId = XXXX
csb.iac.appSecret = XXXX
feign.httpclient.enabled = false
feign.okhttp.enabled = true
feign.okhttp.readTimeout = 60
feign.okhttp.connectTimeout = 60
feign.okhttp.writeTimeout = 120
eureka.instance.preferIpAddress = true
eureka.client.serviceUrl.defaultZone = https://eureka-sit1.gz.cvte.cn/eureka/,https://eureka-sit2.gz.cvte.cn/eureka/
csb.redis.app_prefix = CSB
csb.datapermission.codename = ORG_CODE
spring.redis.database = 13
spring.redis.host = redis-test001.gz.cvte.cn
spring.redis.port = 6379
spring.redis.password = Pass4redisserver
spring.redis.pool.max-active = 8
spring.redis.pool.max-wait = 1000
spring.redis.pool.max-idle = 8
spring.redis.pool.min-idle = 8
spring.redis.timeout = 60000

csb.swagger.basePackage = com.cvte.csb
csb.swagger.description = legox 接口
csb.swagger.version = 1.0
logging.level.tk.mybatis = DEBUG
logging.level.com.cvte.csb = DEBUG
logging.level.org.springframework.core = INFO
#配置自己的
spring.application.name = XXXX
#需配置自己的
spring.datasource.url = jdbc:oracle:thin:@XXXX:1521/XXXX
spring.datasource.driver-class-name = oracle.jdbc.driver.OracleDriver
spring.datasource.username = XXXX
spring.datasource.password = XXXX
spring.datasource.filters = stat
spring.datasource.maxActive = 20
spring.datasource.initialSize = 1
spring.datasource.maxWait = 60000
spring.datasource.minIdle = 1
spring.datasource.timeBetweenEvictionRunsMillis = 60000
spring.datasource.minEvictableIdleTimeMillis = 300000
spring.datasource.validationQuery = select 'x' from DUAL
spring.datasource.testWhileIdle = true
spring.datasource.testOnBorrow = false
spring.datasource.testOnReturn = false
spring.datasource.poolPreparedStatements = true
spring.datasource.maxOpenPreparedStatements = 20
spring.aop.proxy-target-class = true
#密码加密秘钥
cvte.pwd.secretKey = XXXX
cvte.token.expireTime = 1800
cvte.token.secretKey = XXXX
cvte.token.issuer = sys-base
cvte.4a.siamHost = https://login.cvte.com
server.port = 65001
#无效,
server.appId = XXXX
server.systemId = XXXX
server.systemSecret = XXXX
server.context-path = /legox
csb.log.queueName = csb_log_queue_uat
csb.log.exchangeName = csb_log_exchange
csb.base.iac.systemId = XXXX
cvte.4a.authUrl = /api/v2/token/jwt/auth
csb.serialno.docName.postCode = POST_SERIAL
server.isSingleLoad = false
cvte.login.maxFailLoginNums = 99999
csb.serialno.url.server = https://XXXX/legox
csb.job.executor.appname = csb-sys-base-sit
csb.job.admin.addresses = https://job.gz.cvte.cn/admin/
csb.mybatis.basePackage = com.cvte.csb.sys.base.mapper,com.cvte.csb.serial.core.mapper,com.cvte.csb.dictionary.mapper,com.cvte.csb.sys.database.mapper
csb.job.executor.ip =
csb.job.executor.port = 9998
csb.job.executor.logpath =
csb.database.encryptKey = XXXX
csb.serialno.url.serialNo = /%s/v1/serial/%s/non_tree
csb.serialno.url.serialNoWithTree = /%s/v1/serial/%s/tree/%s
csb.serialno.url.serialNoBatch = /%s/v1/serial/%s/batch_non_tree/%s

lcp.core.url = https://lcpsit.gz.cvte.cn/app
csb.allow.appId.menu.query.resource = false
#产品线名称
lcp.log.prodLine = XXXX
lcp.log.sender.web.baseUrl = https://lcpsit.gz.cvte.cn/log
```

### 1.3 nacos配置


- 需提供当前部署的租户ID和数据库信息给到【王浩彬】，新增租户配置
- 如果天舟云的数据库与legox的数据库不一致，需要给两份以下配置
需提供的信息示例如下：

```
# 数据库配置，必须配置成自己的
druid.url = jdbc:postgresql://postgres002.gz.cvte.cn:1921/**_tzc?&ssl=false
druid.username = user
druid.password = 123*****
druid.driver-class-name = org.postgresql.Driver
```


## 2 鲸云配置


此处展示的是鲸云环境变量配置，项目部署完整请参考V1.6.0的文档

### 2.1 lcp-hub项目鲸云配置


[图片2: null]


```
JAVA_OPTS = -XX:+HeapDumpOnOutOfMemoryError -XX:HeapDumpPath=/app/heapdump.hprof -Denv=PRO
app.id = 1234
apollo.app.namespaces = application
lcp.log.enabled = true
lcp.log.sender.type = web
```


### 2.2 lcp-app项目鲸云配置


[图片3: null]


```
JAVA_OPTS = -XX:+HeapDumpOnOutOfMemoryError -XX:HeapDumpPath=/app/heapdump.hprof -Denv=PRO
app.id = 1234
apollo.app.namespaces = application
csb.feignName = csb-legox/legox
lcp.log.enabled = true
lcp.log.sender.type = web
```


### 2.3 lcp-data项目鲸云配置


[图片4: null]


```
JAVA_OPTS = -XX:+HeapDumpOnOutOfMemoryError -XX:HeapDumpPath=/app/heapdump.hprof -Denv=PRO
app.id = 1234
apollo.app.namespaces = application
lcp.log.enabled = true
lcp.log.sender.type = web
```


### 2.3 csb-legox项目鲸云配置


[图片5: null]


```
JAVA_OPTS = -XX:+HeapDumpOnOutOfMemoryError -XX:HeapDumpPath=/app/heapdump.hprof -Denv=PRO
app.id = 1234
apollo.app.namespaces = application
lcp.log.enabled = true
lcp.log.sender.type = web
```


## 3 数据库脚本


此处是额外无法自动执行的，有些是选配的，legox脚本是基于原来增量的脚本

### 3.1 lcp-data脚本


此处为业务数据库执行的，不是配置数据库的脚本，在系统中自己增加的数据源才需要，而且是需要使用【对象】【变更】等功能时候才需要，否则不需要执行

```
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS obj_version;
CREATE TABLE obj_version(
                            ID VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
                            OBJ_ID VARCHAR(32),
                            CHANGE_ID VARCHAR(32),
                            CHANGE_TYPE VARCHAR(64),
                            IS_RELEASED VARCHAR(1),
                            IS_LATEST VARCHAR(1) NOT NULL,
                            VERSION_NO VARCHAR(128),
                            PRE_VERSION_NO VARCHAR(128),
                            RELEASE_TIME TIMESTAMP,
                            SORT_NO INTEGER,
                            IS_ENABLED VARCHAR(1),
                            IS_DELETED VARCHAR(1),
                            CRT_USER VARCHAR(32),
                            CRT_NAME VARCHAR(64),
                            CRT_TIME TIMESTAMP,
                            CRT_HOST VARCHAR(64),
                            UPD_USER VARCHAR(32),
                            UPD_NAME VARCHAR(64),
                            UPD_TIME TIMESTAMP,
                            UPD_HOST VARCHAR(64),
                            PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

COMMENT ON TABLE obj_version IS '对象版本';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_version.ID IS '主键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_version.OBJ_ID IS '对象ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_version.CHANGE_ID IS '变更ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_version.CHANGE_TYPE IS '变更类型';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_version.IS_RELEASED IS '是否已发布';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_version.IS_LATEST IS '是否最新已发布版本';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_version.VERSION_NO IS '版本号';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_version.PRE_VERSION_NO IS '上一个版本';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_version.RELEASE_TIME IS '发布时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_version.SORT_NO IS '排序';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_version.IS_ENABLED IS '禁用启用';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_version.IS_DELETED IS '是否删除';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_version.CRT_USER IS '创建人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_version.CRT_NAME IS '创建人名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_version.CRT_TIME IS '创建时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_version.CRT_HOST IS '创建地址';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_version.UPD_USER IS '更新人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_version.UPD_NAME IS '更新人名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_version.UPD_TIME IS '更新时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_version.UPD_HOST IS '更新地址';

create index idx_obj_version_n1 on OBJ_VERSION(obj_id);
create index idx_obj_version_n2 on OBJ_VERSION(change_id);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS obj_attr_value_list;
CREATE TABLE obj_attr_value_list
(
    id         varchar(32) NOT NULL,
    list_id    varchar(32),
    list_type  varchar(32),
    attr_id    varchar(32),
    api_name   varchar(255),
    attr_value varchar(1000),
    upd_user   varchar(32),
    upd_time   TIMESTAMP,
    sort_no    integer,
    PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

COMMENT ON TABLE obj_attr_value_list IS '列表属性值';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_list.id IS '主键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_list.list_id IS '列表ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_list.list_type IS '列表类型_TagTypeEnum';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_list.attr_id IS '属性ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_list.api_name IS '属性CODE';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_list.attr_value IS '属性值';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_list.upd_user IS '更新人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_list.upd_time IS '更新时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_list.sort_no IS '排序号（多选值的排序）';

CREATE INDEX idx_attr_value_list_n1 ON obj_attr_value_list(attr_value, api_name) ;
CREATE INDEX idx_attr_value_list_n2 ON obj_attr_value_list(list_id, api_name, attr_value) ;
CREATE INDEX idx_attr_value_list_n3 ON obj_attr_value_list(attr_id, list_id) ;


DROP TABLE IF EXISTS obj_attr_value_version;
CREATE TABLE obj_attr_value_version(
                                       ID VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
                                       VERSION_ID VARCHAR(32),
                                       ATTR_ID VARCHAR(32),
                                       API_NAME VARCHAR(255),
                                       NEW_VALUE VARCHAR(1000),
                                       OLD_VALUE VARCHAR(1000),
                                       ORG_ID VARCHAR(32),
                                       NEW_ONLY_VALUE VARCHAR(32),
                                       OLD_ONLY_VALUE VARCHAR(32),
                                       NEW_ONLY_UNIT VARCHAR(32),
                                       OLD_ONLY_UNIT VARCHAR(32),
                                       UPD_USER VARCHAR(32),
                                       UPD_TIME TIMESTAMP,
                                       SORT_NO INTEGER,
                                       PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

COMMENT ON TABLE obj_attr_value_version IS '属性值版本';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_version.ID IS '主键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_version.VERSION_ID IS '版本ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_version.ATTR_ID IS '属性ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_version.API_NAME IS '属性编码';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_version.NEW_VALUE IS '属性新值';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_version.OLD_VALUE IS '属性旧值';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_version.ORG_ID IS '组织ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_version.NEW_ONLY_VALUE IS '仅新值';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_version.OLD_ONLY_VALUE IS '仅旧值';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_version.NEW_ONLY_UNIT IS '仅新值单位';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_version.OLD_ONLY_UNIT IS '仅旧值单位';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_version.UPD_USER IS '更新人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_version.UPD_TIME IS '更新时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_version.SORT_NO IS '序号（多选值排序）';

-- 版本属性值表
CREATE INDEX IDX_ATTR_VALUE_version_N1 ON OBJ_ATTR_VALUE_version(attr_id, version_id) ;
CREATE INDEX IDX_ATTR_VALUE_version_N2 ON OBJ_ATTR_VALUE_version(version_id, api_name) ;  -- api_name字段需要增加


DROP TABLE IF EXISTS obj_attr_value_org;
CREATE TABLE obj_attr_value_org(
                                   ID VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
                                   OBJ_ID VARCHAR(32),
                                   ATTR_ID VARCHAR(32),
                                   API_NAME VARCHAR(255),
                                   ATTR_VALUE VARCHAR(1000),
                                   ONLY_VALUE VARCHAR(32),
                                   ONLY_UNIT VARCHAR(32),
                                   ORG_ID VARCHAR(32),
                                   UPD_USER VARCHAR(32),
                                   UPD_TIME TIMESTAMP,
                                   SORT_NO INTEGER,
                                   PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

COMMENT ON TABLE obj_attr_value_org IS '分组织管控属性值';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_org.ID IS '主键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_org.OBJ_ID IS '对象ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_org.ATTR_ID IS '属性ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_org.API_NAME IS '属性CODE';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_org.ATTR_VALUE IS '属性值';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_org.ONLY_VALUE IS '仅属性值';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_org.ONLY_UNIT IS '仅属性单位';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_org.ORG_ID IS '组织ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_org.UPD_USER IS '更新人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_org.UPD_TIME IS '更新时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_org.SORT_NO IS '排序号（多选值的排序）';

CREATE INDEX idx_attr_value_org_n1 ON obj_attr_value_org(attr_value, api_name) ;
CREATE INDEX idx_attr_value_org_n2 ON obj_attr_value_org(obj_id, api_name, attr_value) ;
CREATE INDEX idx_attr_value_org_n3 ON obj_attr_value_org(attr_id, obj_id) ;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS obj_attr_value_ex;
CREATE TABLE obj_attr_value_ex(
                                  ID VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
                                  CLOB_VALUE TEXT,
                                  PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

COMMENT ON TABLE obj_attr_value_ex IS '大文本属性值';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_ex.ID IS '主键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value_ex.CLOB_VALUE IS '大文本属性值';

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS obj_attr_value;
CREATE TABLE obj_attr_value(
                               ID VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
                               OBJ_ID VARCHAR(32),
                               ATTR_ID VARCHAR(32),
                               API_NAME VARCHAR(255),
                               ATTR_VALUE VARCHAR(1000),
                               ONLY_VALUE VARCHAR(32),
                               ONLY_UNIT VARCHAR(32),
                               UPD_USER VARCHAR(32),
                               UPD_TIME TIMESTAMP,
                               SORT_NO INTEGER,
                               PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

COMMENT ON TABLE obj_attr_value IS '属性值';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value.ID IS '主键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value.OBJ_ID IS '对象ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value.ATTR_ID IS '属性ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value.API_NAME IS '属性CODE';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value.ATTR_VALUE IS '属性值';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value.ONLY_VALUE IS '仅属性值';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value.ONLY_UNIT IS '仅属性单位';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value.UPD_USER IS '更新人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value.UPD_TIME IS '更新时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_attr_value.SORT_NO IS '排序号（多选值的排序）';

-- 属性值
CREATE INDEX IDX_ATTR_VALUE_ITEM_ATTR_N1 ON OBJ_ATTR_VALUE(ATTR_VALUE, API_NAME) ;
CREATE INDEX IDX_ATTR_VALUE_ITEM_ATTR_N2 ON OBJ_ATTR_VALUE(OBJ_ID, API_NAME, ATTR_VALUE) ;
CREATE INDEX IDX_ATTR_VALUE_ITEM_ATTR_N3 ON OBJ_ATTR_VALUE(ATTR_ID, OBJ_ID) ;


-- -------------------------------------------------------------- 附件相关  --------------------------------------------------------------
-- ALTER TABLE obj_file DROP COLUMN last_view_time;
--  ALTER TABLE obj_file DROP COLUMN last_download_time;
-- ALTER TABLE obj_file DROP COLUMN srm_file_id;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS obj_file_data;
CREATE TABLE obj_file_data(
                         id VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
                         csb_file_id varchar(50),
                         file_name varchar(800),
                         description varchar(500),
                         file_size numeric,
                         file_type varchar(20),
                         check_status VARCHAR(1),
                         checksum VARCHAR(255),
                         is_deleted VARCHAR(1),
                         crt_user VARCHAR(32),
                         crt_name varchar(50),
                         crt_time timestamp,
                         crt_host varchar(50),
                         upd_user VARCHAR(32),
                         upd_name varchar(50),
                         upd_time timestamp,
                         upd_host varchar(50),
                         obj_id varchar(32) NULL,
                         obj_class_id varchar(32) NULL,
                         app_id VARCHAR(64),
                         product_id VARCHAR(64),
                         tenant_id VARCHAR(64),
                         PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

COMMENT ON TABLE obj_file_data IS '附件记录';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_data.id IS '主键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_data.csb_file_id IS '附件服务ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_data.file_name IS '附件名称';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_data.description IS '描述';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_data.file_size IS '附件大小';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_data.file_type IS '附件类型';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_data.check_status IS '状态';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_data.checksum IS '文件校验和';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_data.is_deleted IS '是否删除';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_data.obj_id IS '表单对象ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_data.obj_class_id IS '表单分类ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_data.app_id IS '应用ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_data.tenant_id IS '应用ID';


DROP TABLE IF EXISTS obj_file_info;
CREATE TABLE obj_file_info(
                              ID VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
                              FILE_NAME VARCHAR(2000),
                              DESCRIPTION VARCHAR(4000),
                              FILE_TYPE VARCHAR(32),
                              CHECK_STATUS VARCHAR(1),
                              ATTRIBUTE1 VARCHAR(255),
                              ATTRIBUTE2 VARCHAR(255),
                              IS_ENABLED VARCHAR(1),
                              IS_DELETED VARCHAR(1),
                              CRT_USER VARCHAR(32),
                              CRT_NAME VARCHAR(64),
                              CRT_TIME TIMESTAMP,
                              CRT_HOST VARCHAR(64),
                              UPD_USER VARCHAR(32),
                              UPD_NAME VARCHAR(64),
                              UPD_TIME TIMESTAMP,
                              UPD_HOST VARCHAR(64),
                              APP_ID VARCHAR(64),
                              product_id VARCHAR(64),
                              TENANT_ID VARCHAR(64),
                              PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

COMMENT ON TABLE obj_file_info IS '附件信息';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_info.ID IS '主键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_info.FILE_NAME IS '附件名称';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_info.DESCRIPTION IS '附件描述';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_info.FILE_TYPE IS '附件类型';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_info.CHECK_STATUS IS '签入签出状态';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_info.ATTRIBUTE1 IS '扩展属性1';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_info.ATTRIBUTE2 IS '扩展属性2';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_info.IS_ENABLED IS '禁用启用';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_info.IS_DELETED IS '是否删除';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_info.CRT_USER IS '创建人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_info.CRT_NAME IS '创建人名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_info.CRT_TIME IS '创建时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_info.CRT_HOST IS '创建地址';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_info.UPD_USER IS '更新人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_info.UPD_NAME IS '更新人名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_info.UPD_TIME IS '更新时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_info.UPD_HOST IS '更新地址';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_info.APP_ID IS '应用ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_info.TENANT_ID IS '租户号';

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS obj_file_revision;
CREATE TABLE obj_file_revision(
                                  ID VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
                                  FILE_INFO_ID VARCHAR(32),
                                  FILE_ID VARCHAR(32),
                                  OBJ_ID VARCHAR(32),
                                  OBJ_TABLE VARCHAR(64),
                                  CHANGE_ID VARCHAR(32),
                                  REVISION_NO VARCHAR(32),
                                  CHECK_IN_TIME TIMESTAMP,
                                  IS_ENABLED VARCHAR(1),
                                  IS_DELETED VARCHAR(1),
                                  CRT_USER VARCHAR(32),
                                  CRT_NAME VARCHAR(64),
                                  CRT_TIME TIMESTAMP,
                                  CRT_HOST VARCHAR(64),
                                  UPD_USER VARCHAR(32),
                                  UPD_NAME VARCHAR(64),
                                  UPD_TIME TIMESTAMP,
                                  UPD_HOST VARCHAR(64),
                                  APP_ID VARCHAR(64),
                                  product_id VARCHAR(64),
                                  TENANT_ID VARCHAR(64),
                                  PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

COMMENT ON TABLE obj_file_revision IS '对象附件版次';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision.ID IS '主键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision.FILE_INFO_ID IS '附件信息ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision.FILE_ID IS '附件ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision.OBJ_ID IS '对象ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision.OBJ_TABLE IS '对象表名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision.CHANGE_ID IS '变更ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision.REVISION_NO IS '版次号';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision.CHECK_IN_TIME IS '发布时间（签入时间）';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision.IS_ENABLED IS '禁用启用';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision.IS_DELETED IS '是否删除';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision.CRT_USER IS '创建人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision.CRT_NAME IS '创建人名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision.CRT_TIME IS '创建时间（签出时间）';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision.CRT_HOST IS '创建地址';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision.UPD_USER IS '更新人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision.UPD_NAME IS '更新人名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision.UPD_TIME IS '更新时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision.UPD_HOST IS '更新地址';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision.APP_ID IS '应用ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision.TENANT_ID IS '租户号';

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS obj_file_revision_rel;
CREATE TABLE obj_file_revision_rel(
                                      ID VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
                                      OBJ_ID VARCHAR(32),
                                      OBJ_TABLE VARCHAR(64),
                                      CHANGE_ID VARCHAR(32),
                                      FILE_INFO_ID VARCHAR(32),
                                      FILE_REVISION_ID VARCHAR(32),
                                      IS_OBJ_MAIN_FILE VARCHAR(1),
                                      OPERATORS VARCHAR(100),
                                      IS_ENABLED VARCHAR(1),
                                      IS_DELETED VARCHAR(1),
                                      CRT_USER VARCHAR(32),
                                      CRT_NAME VARCHAR(64),
                                      CRT_TIME TIMESTAMP,
                                      CRT_HOST VARCHAR(64),
                                      UPD_USER VARCHAR(32),
                                      UPD_NAME VARCHAR(64),
                                      UPD_TIME TIMESTAMP,
                                      UPD_HOST VARCHAR(64),
                                      APP_ID VARCHAR(64),
                                      product_id VARCHAR(64),
                                      TENANT_ID VARCHAR(64),
                                      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

COMMENT ON TABLE obj_file_revision_rel IS '附件版次关系';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision_rel.ID IS '主键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision_rel.OBJ_ID IS '对象ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision_rel.OBJ_TABLE IS '对象表名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision_rel.CHANGE_ID IS '变更ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision_rel.FILE_INFO_ID IS '附件信息ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision_rel.FILE_REVISION_ID IS '生效文件版次id';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision_rel.IS_OBJ_MAIN_FILE IS '是否文件对象的主附件';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision_rel.OPERATORS IS '操作类型, 多个逗号隔开';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision_rel.IS_ENABLED IS '禁用启用';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision_rel.IS_DELETED IS '是否删除';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision_rel.CRT_USER IS '创建人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision_rel.CRT_NAME IS '创建人名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision_rel.CRT_TIME IS '创建时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision_rel.CRT_HOST IS '创建地址';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision_rel.UPD_USER IS '更新人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision_rel.UPD_NAME IS '更新人名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision_rel.UPD_TIME IS '更新时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision_rel.UPD_HOST IS '更新地址';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision_rel.APP_ID IS '应用ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_file_revision_rel.TENANT_ID IS '租户号';

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS obj_relation;
-- 对象关联关系2023年08月01日
CREATE TABLE obj_relation
(
    ID                    VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    OBJ_ID                VARCHAR(32),
    OBJ_CLASS_ID          VARCHAR(32),
    OBJ_TABLE             VARCHAR(64),
    RELATION_OBJ_ID       VARCHAR(32),
    RELATION_OBJ_CLASS_ID VARCHAR(32),
    RELATION_OBJ_TABLE    VARCHAR(64),
    SOURCE_ATTR_ID        VARCHAR(36),
    FORBID_DELETE         VARCHAR(1),
    IS_DELETED            VARCHAR(1),
    CRT_USER              VARCHAR(32),
    CRT_NAME              VARCHAR(50),
    CRT_TIME              TIMESTAMP,
    CRT_HOST              VARCHAR(50),
    UPD_USER              VARCHAR(32),
    UPD_NAME              VARCHAR(50),
    UPD_TIME              TIMESTAMP,
    UPD_HOST              VARCHAR(50),
    APP_ID                VARCHAR(64),
    TENANT_ID             VARCHAR(64),
    product_id            varchar(64)
);
COMMENT ON TABLE obj_relation IS '对象关联关系表';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_relation.OBJ_ID IS '当前对象ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_relation.OBJ_CLASS_ID IS '当前对象分类ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_relation.OBJ_TABLE IS '当前对象表名,来源 obj_class.api_name,如果有变更需要一起调整';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_relation.RELATION_OBJ_ID IS '关联对象ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_relation.RELATION_OBJ_CLASS_ID IS '关联对象分类ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_relation.RELATION_OBJ_TABLE IS '关联对象表名,来源 obj_class.api_name,如果有变更需要一起调整';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_relation.SOURCE_ATTR_ID IS '关联属性ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_relation.FORBID_DELETE IS '禁删标志, 默认 0';

-- -------------------------------------------------------------- BOM 2023年09月06日  --------------------------------------------------------------
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS obj_bom;
/* 1. 创建BOM表 */
CREATE TABLE obj_bom(
                        ID VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
                        PARENT_OBJ_ID VARCHAR(32),
                        OBJ_ID VARCHAR(32),
                        OBJ_NUMBER VARCHAR(255),
                        VERSION_IN VARCHAR(32),
                        VERSION_OUT VARCHAR(32),
                        PRIOR_BOM VARCHAR(32),
                        CRT_USER VARCHAR(32),
                        CRT_NAME VARCHAR(64),
                        CRT_TIME TIMESTAMP,
                        CRT_HOST VARCHAR(64),
                        UPD_USER VARCHAR(32),
                        UPD_NAME VARCHAR(64),
                        UPD_TIME TIMESTAMP,
                        UPD_HOST VARCHAR(64),
                        PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

COMMENT ON TABLE obj_bom IS 'BOM表;';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom.ID IS '主键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom.PARENT_OBJ_ID IS '产品实例ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom.OBJ_ID IS '子物件实例ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom.OBJ_NUMBER IS '子物件实例编号';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom.VERSION_IN IS '进入版本ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom.VERSION_OUT IS '退出版本ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom.PRIOR_BOM IS '前置bom';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom.CRT_USER IS '创建人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom.CRT_NAME IS '创建人名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom.CRT_TIME IS '创建时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom.CRT_HOST IS '创建地址';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom.UPD_USER IS '更新人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom.UPD_NAME IS '更新人名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom.UPD_TIME IS '更新时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom.UPD_HOST IS '更新地址';

CREATE INDEX IDX_OBJ_BOM_PARENT_OBJ_ID ON OBJ_BOM(PARENT_OBJ_ID, VERSION_IN);
CREATE INDEX IDX_OBJ_BOM_OBJ_ID ON OBJ_BOM(OBJ_ID);
CREATE INDEX IDX_OBJ_BOM_OBJ_NO ON OBJ_BOM(OBJ_NUMBER);
CREATE INDEX IDX_OBJ_BOM_VER_IN ON OBJ_BOM(VERSION_IN);
CREATE INDEX IDX_OBJ_BOM_VER_OUT ON OBJ_BOM(VERSION_OUT);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS obj_bom_designator;
/* 2. 创建bom位号表*/
CREATE TABLE obj_bom_designator(
                                   ID VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
                                   BOM_ID VARCHAR(32),
                                   LABEL VARCHAR(255),
                                   SORT_NO INTEGER,
                                   IS_ENABLED VARCHAR(1),
                                   IS_DELETED VARCHAR(1),
                                   CRT_USER VARCHAR(32),
                                   CRT_NAME VARCHAR(64),
                                   CRT_TIME TIMESTAMP,
                                   CRT_HOST VARCHAR(64),
                                   PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

COMMENT ON TABLE obj_bom_designator IS 'bom位号;';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_designator.ID IS '主键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_designator.BOM_ID IS 'BOMID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_designator.LABEL IS '位号';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_designator.SORT_NO IS '序号';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_designator.IS_ENABLED IS '禁用启用';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_designator.IS_DELETED IS '是否删除';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_designator.CRT_USER IS '创建人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_designator.CRT_NAME IS '创建人名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_designator.CRT_TIME IS '创建时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_designator.CRT_HOST IS '创建地址';

CREATE INDEX IDX_OBJ_BOM_DESIGNATOR_BOM_ID ON OBJ_BOM_DESIGNATOR(BOM_ID);

/* 3. 创建bom替代料表*/
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS obj_bom_substitute;
CREATE TABLE obj_bom_substitute(
                                   ID VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
                                   BOM_ID VARCHAR(32),
                                   OBJ_ID VARCHAR(32),
                                   OBJ_NUMBER VARCHAR(255),
                                   IS_ENABLED VARCHAR(1),
                                   IS_DELETED VARCHAR(1),
                                   CRT_USER VARCHAR(32),
                                   CRT_NAME VARCHAR(64),
                                   CRT_TIME TIMESTAMP,
                                   CRT_HOST VARCHAR(64),
                                   UPD_USER VARCHAR(32),
                                   UPD_NAME VARCHAR(64),
                                   UPD_TIME TIMESTAMP,
                                   UPD_HOST VARCHAR(64),
                                   PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

COMMENT ON TABLE obj_bom_substitute IS 'BOM替代料;';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_substitute.ID IS '主键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_substitute.BOM_ID IS 'BOMID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_substitute.OBJ_ID IS '替代料ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_substitute.OBJ_NUMBER IS '替代料编号';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_substitute.IS_ENABLED IS '禁用启用';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_substitute.IS_DELETED IS '是否删除';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_substitute.CRT_USER IS '创建人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_substitute.CRT_NAME IS '创建人名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_substitute.CRT_TIME IS '创建时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_substitute.CRT_HOST IS '创建地址';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_substitute.UPD_USER IS '更新人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_substitute.UPD_NAME IS '更新人名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_substitute.UPD_TIME IS '更新时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN obj_bom_substitute.UPD_HOST IS '更新地址';

create index IDX_OBJ_BOM_SUBST_BOM_ID on OBJ_BOM_SUBSTITUTE(BOM_ID);
create index IDX_OBJ_BOM_SUBST_OBJ_ID on OBJ_BOM_SUBSTITUTE(OBJ_ID);
create index IDX_OBJ_BOM_SUBST_OBJ_NUMBER on OBJ_BOM_SUBSTITUTE(OBJ_NUMBER);

/* BOM快照表 */
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS OBJ_BOM_SNAPSHOT;
CREATE TABLE OBJ_BOM_SNAPSHOT(
                                 ID VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
                                 OBJ_ID VARCHAR(32),
                                 VERSION_ID VARCHAR(32),
                                 BOM_COUNT INTEGER,
                                 SUB_BOM_INFO TEXT,
                                 CRT_USER VARCHAR(32),
                                 CRT_NAME VARCHAR(64),
                                 CRT_TIME TIMESTAMP,
                                 CRT_HOST VARCHAR(64),
                                 PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

COMMENT ON TABLE OBJ_BOM_SNAPSHOT IS 'BOM版本快照;';
COMMENT ON COLUMN OBJ_BOM_SNAPSHOT.ID IS '主键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN OBJ_BOM_SNAPSHOT.OBJ_ID IS '对象ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN OBJ_BOM_SNAPSHOT.VERSION_ID IS '版本ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN OBJ_BOM_SNAPSHOT.BOM_COUNT IS 'BOM数量';
COMMENT ON COLUMN OBJ_BOM_SNAPSHOT.SUB_BOM_INFO IS '子BOM信息json（版本、数量）';
COMMENT ON COLUMN OBJ_BOM_SNAPSHOT.CRT_USER IS '创建人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN OBJ_BOM_SNAPSHOT.CRT_NAME IS '创建人名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN OBJ_BOM_SNAPSHOT.CRT_TIME IS '创建时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN OBJ_BOM_SNAPSHOT.CRT_HOST IS '创建地址';

/* 创建索引 */
CREATE INDEX idx_OBJ_BOM_SNAPSHOT_obj_id ON OBJ_BOM_SNAPSHOT(OBJ_ID);
CREATE INDEX idx_OBJ_BOM_SNAPSHOT_version_id ON OBJ_BOM_SNAPSHOT(VERSION_ID);

```


### 3.2 csb-legox脚本


#### 3.2.1 表结构


```
-- auto_list_form definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE auto_list_form;

CREATE TABLE auto_list_form (
    id varchar(32) NOT NULL, -- ID注释
    p_class_id varchar(32) NULL, -- 父类分类对象ID
    class_id varchar(32) NULL, -- 分类对象ID
    serial_number varchar(100) NULL, -- 表单编码
    description varchar(1024) NULL, -- 描述
    lifecycle varchar(32) NULL, -- 生命周期
    change_id varchar(32) NULL, -- 变更ID
    release_date timestamp NULL, -- 发布日期
    is_enabled varchar(4) NULL, -- 是否生效
    is_deleted varchar(4) NULL, -- 是否删除
    crt_user varchar(64) NULL, -- 创建用户
    crt_name varchar(64) NULL, -- 用户名称
    crt_time timestamp NULL, -- 创建时间
    crt_host varchar(64) NULL, -- 创建人主机
    upd_user varchar(64) NULL, -- 更新人
    upd_name varchar(64) NULL, -- 更新人名称
    upd_time timestamp NULL, -- 更新时间
    upd_host varchar(64) NULL, -- 更新人主机
    tenant_id varchar(64) NULL, -- 租户ID
    app_id varchar(64) NULL, -- 应用系统ID
    org_id varchar(64) NULL, -- 组织机构ID
    wf_relation_id varchar(256) NULL, -- 工作流关联表ID
    wf_instance_id varchar(256) NULL, -- 工作流实例ID
    current_handler varchar(256) NULL, -- 当前操作人
    current_node varchar(256) NULL, -- 当前节点
    dversion_no int4 NULL, -- 数据版本号
    attr1 varchar(1024) NULL, -- 扩展字段
    attr2 varchar(1024) NULL, -- 扩展字段
    attr3 varchar(1024) NULL, -- 扩展字段
    attr4 varchar(1024) NULL, -- 扩展字段
    attr5 varchar(1024) NULL, -- 扩展字段
    attr6 varchar(1024) NULL, -- 扩展字段
    attr7 varchar(1024) NULL, -- 扩展字段
    attr8 varchar(1024) NULL, -- 扩展字段
    attr9 varchar(1024) NULL, -- 扩展字段
    attr10 varchar(1024) NULL, -- 扩展字段
    "name" varchar(256) NULL, -- 姓名
    base_8922bdc24933b int2 NULL, -- 年龄
    base_17284f49c69b5 varchar(128) NULL, -- 身份
    product_id varchar(64) NULL, -- 产品id
    current_node_name varchar(1024) NULL, -- 当前节点名称
    current_handler_name varchar(1024) NULL, -- 当前处理人姓名
    CONSTRAINT auto_list_form_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);
COMMENT ON TABLE auto_list_form IS '自动列表表单';

-- Column comments

COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.id IS 'ID注释';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.p_class_id IS '父类分类对象ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.class_id IS '分类对象ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.serial_number IS '表单编码';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.description IS '描述';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.lifecycle IS '生命周期';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.change_id IS '变更ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.release_date IS '发布日期';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.is_enabled IS '是否生效';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.is_deleted IS '是否删除';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.crt_user IS '创建用户';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.crt_name IS '用户名称';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.crt_time IS '创建时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.crt_host IS '创建人主机';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.upd_user IS '更新人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.upd_name IS '更新人名称';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.upd_time IS '更新时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.upd_host IS '更新人主机';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.tenant_id IS '租户ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.app_id IS '应用系统ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.org_id IS '组织机构ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.wf_relation_id IS '工作流关联表ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.wf_instance_id IS '工作流实例ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.current_handler IS '当前操作人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.current_node IS '当前节点';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.dversion_no IS '数据版本号';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.attr1 IS '扩展字段';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.attr2 IS '扩展字段';
COMMENT ON COLUMN auto_list_form.attr3 IS '扩展字段';

-- dictionary_item definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE dictionary_item;

CREATE TABLE dictionary_item (
    id varchar(36) NOT NULL, -- 主键
    "name" varchar(256) NULL, -- 名称
    code varchar(80) NULL, -- 编码
    dictionary_type_id varchar(36) NULL, -- 类型id
    dictionary_type_code varchar(80) NULL, -- 类型编码
    item_value varchar(200) NULL, -- 值
    is_default bpchar(1) NULL, -- 是否默认
    sort_no numeric NULL, -- 排序码
    description varchar(800) NULL , -- 描述
    item_parent_id varchar(36) NULL , -- 父级id
    hierarchy_id varchar(1000) NULL, -- 继承树id
    attribute1 varchar(240) NULL, -- 弹性域1
    attribute2 varchar(240) NULL, -- 弹性域2
    attribute3 varchar(240) NULL, -- 弹性域3
    attribute4 varchar(240) NULL, -- 弹性域4
    attribute5 varchar(240) NULL, -- 弹性域5
    is_deleted bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT 0, -- 是否删除
    is_enabled bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT 1, -- 是否有效
    crt_user varchar(64) NULL, -- 创建人
    crt_name varchar(255) NULL , -- 创建人姓名
    crt_time timestamp NULL, -- 创建时间
    crt_host varchar(128) NULL, -- 创建主机
    upd_user varchar(64) NULL, -- 最后修改人
    upd_name varchar(255) NULL , -- 最后修改人姓名
    upd_time timestamp NULL, -- 最后修改时间
    upd_host varchar(128) NULL, -- 最后修改主机
    org_code varchar(1000) NULL, -- 所属组织编码
    app_id varchar(36) NULL, -- 租户ID
    system_id varchar(36) NULL, -- 系统ID
    newest varchar(4) NULL, -- 是否最新同步值
    CONSTRAINT dictionary_item_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);
COMMENT ON TABLE dictionary_item IS '数据字典代码项';

-- Column comments

COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.id IS '主键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item."name" IS '名称';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.code IS '编码';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.dictionary_type_id IS '类型id';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.dictionary_type_code IS '类型编码';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.item_value IS '值';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.is_default IS '是否默认';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.sort_no IS '排序码';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.description IS '描述';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.item_parent_id IS '父级id';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.hierarchy_id IS '继承树id';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.attribute1 IS '弹性域1';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.attribute2 IS '弹性域2';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.attribute3 IS '弹性域3';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.attribute4 IS '弹性域4';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.attribute5 IS '弹性域5';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.is_deleted IS '是否删除';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.is_enabled IS '是否有效';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.crt_user IS '创建人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.crt_name IS '创建人姓名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.crt_time IS '创建时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.crt_host IS '创建主机';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.upd_user IS '最后修改人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.upd_name IS '最后修改人姓名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.upd_time IS '最后修改时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.upd_host IS '最后修改主机';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.org_code IS '所属组织编码';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.app_id IS '租户ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.system_id IS '系统ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_item.newest IS '是否最新同步值';


-- dictionary_type definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE dictionary_type;

CREATE TABLE dictionary_type (
    id varchar(36) NOT NULL, -- 主键ID
    app_id varchar(36) NULL, -- 租户ID
    parent_id varchar(36) NULL, -- 父级ID
    code varchar(80) NULL, -- 编码
    "name" varchar(100) NULL, -- 名称
    description varchar(800) NULL, -- 描述
    "type" varchar(36) NULL, -- 类型
    type_name varchar(80) NULL, -- 类型名称
    control_type varchar(36) NULL, -- 控件类型字典
    control_type_name varchar(80) NULL, -- 控件类型
    hierarchy_id varchar(1000) NULL, -- 继承树ID
    attribute1 varchar(240) NULL, -- 弹性域1
    attribute2 varchar(240) NULL, -- 弹性域2
    attribute3 varchar(240) NULL, -- 弹性域3
    attribute4 varchar(240) NULL, -- 弹性域4
    attribute5 varchar(240) NULL, -- 弹性域5
    is_deleted bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT 0, -- 是否删除
    is_enabled bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT 1, -- 是否有效
    is_editable bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT 1, -- 是否可编辑
    crt_user varchar(64) NULL , -- 创建人
    crt_name varchar(255) NULL, -- 创建人姓名
    crt_host varchar(128) NULL , -- 创建主机
    crt_time timestamp NULL, -- 创建时间
    upd_user varchar(64) NULL , -- 最后修改人
    upd_name varchar(255) NULL, -- 最后修改人姓名
    upd_host varchar(128) NULL , -- 最后修改主机
    upd_time timestamp NULL, -- 最后修改时间
    system_id varchar(36) NULL, -- 系统ID
    sort_no numeric NULL,
    dict_type bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT '1'::bpchar, -- 类型(静态/动态数据字典)
    is_tree bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT '0'::bpchar, -- 是否为树形：0否，1是
    sync_interval numeric(38) NULL, -- 同步间隔:x小时
    sync_time timestamp NULL, -- 同步时间
    sync_succeed varchar(1) NULL DEFAULT '0'::character varying, -- 是否同步成功：0否，1是
    app_type varchar(64) NULL, -- 应用类型过滤
    params_json varchar(4000) NULL, -- 请求参数JSON
    CONSTRAINT dictionary_type_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);
COMMENT ON TABLE dictionary_type IS '数据字典类型';

-- Column comments

COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.id IS '主键ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.app_id IS '租户ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.parent_id IS '父级ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.code IS '编码';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type."name" IS '名称';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.description IS '描述';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type."type" IS '类型';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.type_name IS '类型名称';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.control_type IS '控件类型字典';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.control_type_name IS '控件类型';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.hierarchy_id IS '继承树ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.attribute1 IS '弹性域1';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.attribute2 IS '弹性域2';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.attribute3 IS '弹性域3';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.attribute4 IS '弹性域4';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.attribute5 IS '弹性域5';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.is_deleted IS '是否删除';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.is_enabled IS '是否有效';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.is_editable IS '是否可编辑';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.crt_user IS '创建人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.crt_name IS '创建人姓名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.crt_host IS '创建主机';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.crt_time IS '创建时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.upd_user IS '最后修改人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.upd_name IS '最后修改人姓名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.upd_host IS '最后修改主机';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.upd_time IS '最后修改时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.system_id IS '系统ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.dict_type IS '类型(静态/动态数据字典)';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.is_tree IS '是否为树形：0否，1是';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.sync_interval IS '同步间隔:x小时';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.sync_time IS '同步时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.sync_succeed IS '是否同步成功：0否，1是';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.app_type IS '应用类型过滤';
COMMENT ON COLUMN dictionary_type.params_json IS '请求参数JSON';


-- ec_event_program definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE ec_event_program;

CREATE TABLE ec_event_program (
    id varchar(36) NOT NULL, -- 主键ID
    form_api_name varchar(50) NULL, -- 表单标识
    exec_class_name varchar(50) NULL, -- 类id
    program_desc varchar(50) NULL, -- 描述说明
    program_type varchar(50) NULL, -- 类型
    exec_order varchar(50) NULL, -- 执行顺序
    exec_type varchar(50) NULL, -- 执行方式
    error_handler varchar(50) NULL, -- 错误处理方式
    service_type varchar(50) NULL, -- 服务类型
    service_name varchar(50) NULL, -- 服务名/域名地址
    is_enabled varchar(1) NULL DEFAULT '0'::character varying, -- 是否启用
    is_deleted varchar(1) NULL DEFAULT '0'::character varying, -- 是否删除
    crt_user varchar(50) NULL, -- 创建人
    crt_name varchar(64) NULL, -- 创建人姓名
    crt_host varchar(100) NULL, -- 创建主机
    crt_time timestamp NULL, -- 创建时间
    upd_user varchar(100) NULL, -- 最后更新人
    upd_name varchar(64) NULL, -- 更新人姓名
    upd_host varchar(100) NULL, -- 最后更新人主机
    upd_time timestamp NULL, -- 最后更新时间
    event_id varchar(64) NULL,
    app_id varchar(64) NULL, -- 应用ID
    tenant_id varchar(64) NULL, -- 租户ID
    CONSTRAINT ec_event_program_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);
COMMENT ON TABLE ec_event_program IS '事件执行程序';

-- Column comments

COMMENT ON COLUMN ec_event_program.id IS '主键ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN ec_event_program.form_api_name IS '表单标识';
COMMENT ON COLUMN ec_event_program.exec_class_name IS '类id';
COMMENT ON COLUMN ec_event_program.program_desc IS '描述说明';
COMMENT ON COLUMN ec_event_program.program_type IS '类型';
COMMENT ON COLUMN ec_event_program.exec_order IS '执行顺序';
COMMENT ON COLUMN ec_event_program.exec_type IS '执行方式';
COMMENT ON COLUMN ec_event_program.error_handler IS '错误处理方式';
COMMENT ON COLUMN ec_event_program.service_type IS '服务类型';
COMMENT ON COLUMN ec_event_program.service_name IS '服务名/域名地址';
COMMENT ON COLUMN ec_event_program.is_enabled IS '是否启用';
COMMENT ON COLUMN ec_event_program.is_deleted IS '是否删除';
COMMENT ON COLUMN ec_event_program.crt_user IS '创建人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN ec_event_program.crt_name IS '创建人姓名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN ec_event_program.crt_host IS '创建主机';
COMMENT ON COLUMN ec_event_program.crt_time IS '创建时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN ec_event_program.upd_user IS '最后更新人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN ec_event_program.upd_name IS '更新人姓名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN ec_event_program.upd_host IS '最后更新人主机';
COMMENT ON COLUMN ec_event_program.upd_time IS '最后更新时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN ec_event_program.app_id IS '应用ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN ec_event_program.tenant_id IS '租户ID';

CREATE TABLE file_auth (
    id varchar(255) NOT NULL,
    file_ref_id varchar(255) NULL,
    auth_id varchar(255) NULL,
    auth_type varchar(32) NULL,
    auth_code varchar(255) NULL,
    crt_name varchar(255) NULL,
    crt_user varchar(255) NULL,
    crt_time timestamp NULL,
    crt_host varchar(255) NULL,
    upd_user varchar(255) NULL,
    upd_name varchar(255) NULL,
    upd_time timestamp NULL,
    upd_host varchar(255) NULL,
    system_id varchar(50) NULL, -- 系统appId
    CONSTRAINT file_auth_file_ref_id_auth_id_auth_type_key UNIQUE (file_ref_id, auth_id, auth_type),
    CONSTRAINT file_auth_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

    "path" varchar(255) NULL,
    expired_time varchar(255) NULL,
    "name" varchar(255) NULL,
    app_id varchar(255) NULL,
    crt_name varchar(255) NULL,
    crt_user varchar(255) NULL,
    crt_time timestamp NULL,
    crt_host varchar(255) NULL,
    upd_user varchar(255) NULL,
    upd_name varchar(255) NULL,
    upd_time timestamp NULL,
    upd_host varchar(255) NULL,
    is_enabled bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT '1'::bpchar,
    is_deleted bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT '0'::bpchar,
    system_id varchar(50) NULL, -- 系统appId
    CONSTRAINT file_category_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

    crt_name varchar(255) NULL,
    crt_user varchar(255) NULL,
    crt_time timestamp NULL,
    crt_host varchar(255) NULL,

    img_width varchar(255) NULL,

    text_mark varchar(255) NULL,

);

CREATE TABLE file_chunk (
    id varchar(32) NOT NULL,
    file_info_id varchar(32) NOT NULL,
    chunk_number int2 NOT NULL,
    current_chunk_size int4 NULL,
    total_size int8 NULL,
    total_chunks int4 NULL,
    identifier varchar(500) NOT NULL,
    upload_id varchar(64) NOT NULL,
    category_id varchar(255) NOT NULL,
    file_name varchar(500) NOT NULL,
    etag varchar(64) NOT NULL,
    app_id varchar(255) NULL,
    crt_name varchar(255) NULL,
    crt_user varchar(255) NULL,
    crt_time timestamp NULL,
    crt_host varchar(255) NULL,
    CONSTRAINT file_chunk_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

    download_method varchar(100) NULL,

    crt_name varchar(255) NULL,
    crt_user varchar(255) NULL,
    crt_time timestamp NULL,
    upd_time timestamp NULL,
    crt_host varchar(255) NULL,

);

    expire_time timestamp NULL,
    app_id varchar(255) NULL,
    crt_name varchar(255) NULL,
    crt_user varchar(255) NULL,
    crt_time timestamp NULL,

);

    view_path varchar(500) NULL,

    attr2 varchar(255) NULL,
    attr3 varchar(255) NULL,
    attr4 varchar(255) NULL,
    crt_name varchar(255) NULL,
    crt_user varchar(255) NULL,

    upd_user varchar(255) NULL,
    upd_name varchar(255) NULL,
    upd_time timestamp NULL,
    upd_host varchar(255) NULL,

);

);

    "type" varchar(255) NULL,
    category_id varchar(255) NULL,
    file_info_id varchar(255) NULL,

    app_id varchar(255) NULL,
    sort_no varchar(255) NULL,
    attr1 varchar(255) NULL,
    attr2 varchar(255) NULL,
    attr3 varchar(255) NULL,
    attr4 varchar(255) NULL,
    crt_name varchar(255) NULL,
    crt_user varchar(255) NULL,

    crt_host varchar(255) NULL,
    upd_user varchar(255) NULL,
    upd_name varchar(255) NULL,

);


-- flyway_schema_history definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE flyway_schema_history;

CREATE TABLE flyway_schema_history (
    installed_rank numeric(38) NOT NULL,
    "version" varchar(50) NULL,
    description varchar(200) NOT NULL,
    "type" varchar(20) NOT NULL,
    script varchar(1000) NOT NULL,
    checksum numeric(38) NULL,
    installed_by varchar(100) NOT NULL,
    installed_on timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    execution_time numeric(38) NOT NULL,
    success int2 NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT flyway_schema_history_pk PRIMARY KEY (installed_rank)
);


-- form_design definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE form_design;

CREATE TABLE form_design (
    id varchar(36) NOT NULL, -- 主键ID
    design_name varchar(128) NULL, -- 设计方案名
    design_code varchar(128) NULL, -- 方案编码
    biz_id varchar(36) NULL, -- 业务实体ID
    biz_type varchar(50) NULL, -- 业务类型
    is_default varchar(1) NULL, -- 是否默认
    is_enabled varchar(1) NULL, -- 是否启用
    is_deleted varchar(1) NULL, -- 是否删除
    attr1 varchar(256) NULL, -- 扩展字段1
    attr2 varchar(256) NULL, -- 扩展字段2
    attr3 varchar(256) NULL, -- 扩展字段3
    attr4 varchar(256) NULL, -- 扩展字段4
    crt_user varchar(50) NULL, -- 创建人
    crt_name varchar(100) NULL, -- 创建人名
    crt_time timestamp NULL, -- 创建时间
    crt_host varchar(100) NULL, -- 创建主机
    upd_user varchar(50) NULL, -- 更新人
    upd_name varchar(50) NULL, -- 更新人名
    upd_time timestamp NULL, -- 更新时间
    upd_host varchar(100) NULL, -- 更新人主机
    CONSTRAINT form_design_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);
COMMENT ON TABLE form_design IS '表单设计方案';

-- Column comments

COMMENT ON COLUMN form_design.id IS '主键ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN form_design.design_name IS '设计方案名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN form_design.design_code IS '方案编码';
COMMENT ON COLUMN form_design.biz_id IS '业务实体ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN form_design.biz_type IS '业务类型';
COMMENT ON COLUMN form_design.is_default IS '是否默认';
COMMENT ON COLUMN form_design.is_enabled IS '是否启用';
COMMENT ON COLUMN form_design.is_deleted IS '是否删除';

COMMENT ON COLUMN form_design.attr2 IS '扩展字段2';
COMMENT ON COLUMN form_design.attr3 IS '扩展字段3';
COMMENT ON COLUMN form_design.attr4 IS '扩展字段4';
COMMENT ON COLUMN form_design.crt_user IS '创建人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN form_design.crt_name IS '创建人名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN form_design.crt_time IS '创建时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN form_design.crt_host IS '创建主机';
COMMENT ON COLUMN form_design.upd_user IS '更新人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN form_design.upd_name IS '更新人名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN form_design.upd_time IS '更新时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN form_design.upd_host IS '更新人主机';


-- general_config definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE general_config;

CREATE TABLE general_config (
    id varchar(36) NOT NULL, -- 主键ID
    config_code varchar(128) NULL, -- 配置代码
    field_mapping varchar(4000) NULL, -- 字段映射
    biz_id varchar(36) NULL, -- 业务实体ID
    biz_type varchar(50) NULL, -- 业务类型
    relate_id varchar(64) NULL, -- 关联ID
    is_enabled varchar(1) NULL, -- 是否启用
    is_deleted varchar(1) NULL, -- 是否删除
    attr1 varchar(4000) NULL, -- 扩展字段1
    attr2 varchar(4000) NULL, -- 扩展字段2
    attr3 varchar(4000) NULL, -- 扩展字段3
    attr4 varchar(4000) NULL, -- 扩展字段4
    attr5 varchar(4000) NULL, -- 扩展字段5
    attr6 varchar(4000) NULL, -- 扩展字段6
    attr7 varchar(4000) NULL, -- 扩展字段7
    attr8 varchar(4000) NULL, -- 扩展字段8
    attr9 varchar(4000) NULL, -- 扩展字段9
    attr10 varchar(4000) NULL, -- 扩展字段10
    crt_user varchar(50) NULL, -- 创建人
    crt_name varchar(100) NULL, -- 创建人名
    crt_time timestamp NULL, -- 创建时间
    crt_host varchar(100) NULL, -- 创建主机
    upd_user varchar(50) NULL, -- 更新人
    upd_name varchar(50) NULL, -- 更新人名
    upd_time timestamp NULL, -- 更新时间
    upd_host varchar(100) NULL, -- 更新人主机
    CONSTRAINT general_config_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);
COMMENT ON TABLE general_config IS '通用配置';

-- Column comments

COMMENT ON COLUMN general_config.id IS '主键ID';

COMMENT ON COLUMN general_config.crt_name IS '创建人名';

-- layout_config definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE layout_config;

CREATE TABLE layout_config (
    id varchar(36) NOT NULL, -- 主键ID
    biz_id varchar(36) NULL, -- 业务实体ID
    code varchar(128) NULL, -- 编码
    "name" varchar(128) NULL, -- 名称
    "type" varchar(64) NULL, -- 类型
    kind varchar(64) NULL, -- 种类
    parent_id varchar(36) NULL, -- 父级ID
    relate_id varchar(64) NULL, -- 关联ID
    sort_no int4 NULL, -- 排序
    biz_type varchar(50) NULL, -- 业务类型
    is_enabled varchar(1) NULL, -- 是否启用
    is_deleted varchar(1) NULL, -- 是否删除
    attr1 varchar(4000) NULL, -- 扩展字段1
    attr2 varchar(4000) NULL, -- 扩展字段2
    attr3 varchar(4000) NULL, -- 扩展字段3
    attr4 varchar(4000) NULL, -- 扩展字段4
    attr5 varchar(4000) NULL, -- 扩展字段5
    attr6 varchar(4000) NULL, -- 扩展字段6
    attr7 varchar(4000) NULL, -- 扩展字段7
    attr8 varchar(4000) NULL, -- 扩展字段8
    attr9 varchar(4000) NULL, -- 扩展字段9
    attr10 varchar(4000) NULL, -- 扩展字段10
    crt_user varchar(50) NULL, -- 创建人
    crt_name varchar(100) NULL, -- 创建人名
    crt_time timestamp NULL, -- 创建时间
    crt_host varchar(100) NULL, -- 创建主机
    upd_user varchar(50) NULL, -- 更新人
    upd_name varchar(50) NULL, -- 更新人名
    upd_time timestamp NULL, -- 更新时间
    upd_host varchar(100) NULL, -- 更新人主机
    attr_alias varchar(512) NULL, -- 别名
    CONSTRAINT layout_config_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);
COMMENT ON TABLE layout_config IS '布局配置';

-- Column comments

COMMENT ON COLUMN layout_config.id IS '主键ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN layout_config.biz_id IS '业务实体ID';

COMMENT ON COLUMN layout_config."type" IS '类型';
COMMENT ON COLUMN layout_config.kind IS '种类';
COMMENT ON COLUMN layout_config.parent_id IS '父级ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN layout_config.relate_id IS '关联ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN layout_config.sort_no IS '排序';

COMMENT ON COLUMN layout_config.is_enabled IS '是否启用';
COMMENT ON COLUMN layout_config.is_deleted IS '是否删除';

COMMENT ON COLUMN layout_config.attr2 IS '扩展字段2';
COMMENT ON COLUMN layout_config.attr3 IS '扩展字段3';
COMMENT ON COLUMN layout_config.attr4 IS '扩展字段4';
COMMENT ON COLUMN layout_config.attr5 IS '扩展字段5';
COMMENT ON COLUMN layout_config.attr6 IS '扩展字段6';
COMMENT ON COLUMN layout_config.attr7 IS '扩展字段7';
COMMENT ON COLUMN layout_config.attr8 IS '扩展字段8';
COMMENT ON COLUMN layout_config.attr9 IS '扩展字段9';
COMMENT ON COLUMN layout_config.attr10 IS '扩展字段10';

-- md_org_admin_org_v definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE md_org_admin_org_v;

CREATE TABLE md_org_admin_org_v (
    dept_oid varchar(36) NOT NULL, -- 部门OID
    dept_name varchar(256) NULL, -- 部门名称
    org_type varchar(50) NULL, -- 组织标签
    dept_level varchar(50) NULL, -- 部门层级
    dept_latest_full_path varchar(1000) NULL, -- 部门最新全路径
    dept_hid varchar(36) NULL, -- 部门HID
    dept_full_path_id varchar(1000) NULL, -- 部门全路径ID
    dept_parent_hid varchar(36) NULL, -- 部门上级HID
    dept_latest_oid varchar(36) NULL, -- 部门最新OID
    dept_latest_name varchar(256) NULL, -- 部门最新名称
    dept_manager varchar(100) NULL, -- 部门经理
    dept_manager_account varchar(100) NULL, -- 部门经理域账号
    primary_approvr varchar(100) NULL, -- 初级审批人
    primary_approvr_account varchar(150) NULL, -- 初级审批人域账号
    middle_approvr varchar(100) NULL, -- 中级审批人
    middle_approvr_account varchar(100) NULL, -- 中级审批人域账号
    senior_approvr varchar(100) NULL, -- 高级审批人
    senior_approvr_account varchar(100) NULL, -- 高级审批人域账号
    enable_date timestamp NULL, -- 生效日期
    disable_date timestamp NULL, -- 失效日期
    status varchar(50) NULL, -- 状态
    is_main_budget varchar(50) NULL, -- 是否预算主体
    mian_budget_id varchar(36) NULL, -- 预算主体ID
    coa_bu_code varchar(50) NULL, -- EBS事业部编码
    cost_center_code varchar(50) NULL, -- 成本中心编码
    ebs_val_set_type varchar(50) NULL, -- EBS值集类型
    is_org_sale bpchar(1) NULL, -- 是否销售组织
    org_sale_type varchar(50) NULL, -- 销售组织类型
    CONSTRAINT md_org_admin_org_v_pkey PRIMARY KEY (dept_oid)
);
COMMENT ON TABLE md_org_admin_org_v IS '行政组织主数据';

-- Column comments

COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.dept_oid IS '部门OID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.dept_name IS '部门名称';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.org_type IS '组织标签';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.dept_level IS '部门层级';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.dept_latest_full_path IS '部门最新全路径';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.dept_hid IS '部门HID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.dept_full_path_id IS '部门全路径ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.dept_parent_hid IS '部门上级HID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.dept_latest_oid IS '部门最新OID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.dept_latest_name IS '部门最新名称';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.dept_manager IS '部门经理';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.dept_manager_account IS '部门经理域账号';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.primary_approvr IS '初级审批人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.primary_approvr_account IS '初级审批人域账号';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.middle_approvr IS '中级审批人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.middle_approvr_account IS '中级审批人域账号';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.senior_approvr IS '高级审批人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.senior_approvr_account IS '高级审批人域账号';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.enable_date IS '生效日期';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.disable_date IS '失效日期';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.status IS '状态';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.is_main_budget IS '是否预算主体';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.mian_budget_id IS '预算主体ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.coa_bu_code IS 'EBS事业部编码';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.cost_center_code IS '成本中心编码';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.ebs_val_set_type IS 'EBS值集类型';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.is_org_sale IS '是否销售组织';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_admin_org_v.org_sale_type IS '销售组织类型';


-- md_org_emp_data_v definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE md_org_emp_data_v;

CREATE TABLE md_org_emp_data_v (
    emp_id varchar(36) NOT NULL, -- 员工ID
    emp_name varchar(256) NULL, -- 员工姓名
    emp_other_name varchar(256) NULL, -- 员工别名
    emp_gender varchar(50) NULL, -- 员工性别
    emp_status varchar(50) NULL, -- 员工状态
    domain_account varchar(64) NULL, -- 域账号
    email varchar(256) NULL, -- 电子邮箱
    dept_oid varchar(36) NOT NULL, -- 部门OID
    dept_hid varchar(36) NULL, -- 部门HID
    dept_full_path varchar(1000) NULL, -- 部门全路径
    dept_name varchar(300) NULL, -- 部门名称
    post_hid varchar(36) NULL, -- 职位HID
    post_name varchar(256) NULL, -- 职位名称
    job_hid varchar(36) NULL, -- 岗位HID
    job_name varchar(256) NULL, -- 岗位名称
    tel varchar(100) NULL, -- 联系电话
    legal_rep varchar(256) NULL, -- 法人公司
    legal_rep_hid varchar(36) NULL, -- 法人公司HID
    emp_dept_oid varchar(36) NULL, -- 员工部门关系OID
    CONSTRAINT md_org_emp_data_v_pkey PRIMARY KEY (emp_id)
);
COMMENT ON TABLE md_org_emp_data_v IS '员工主数据';

-- Column comments

COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_emp_data_v.emp_name IS '员工姓名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_emp_data_v.emp_other_name IS '员工别名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_emp_data_v.emp_gender IS '员工性别';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_emp_data_v.emp_status IS '员工状态';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_emp_data_v.domain_account IS '域账号';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_emp_data_v.email IS '电子邮箱';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_emp_data_v.dept_oid IS '部门OID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_emp_data_v.dept_hid IS '部门HID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_emp_data_v.dept_full_path IS '部门全路径';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_emp_data_v.dept_name IS '部门名称';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_emp_data_v.post_hid IS '职位HID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_emp_data_v.post_name IS '职位名称';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_emp_data_v.job_hid IS '岗位HID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_emp_data_v.job_name IS '岗位名称';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_emp_data_v.tel IS '联系电话';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_emp_data_v.legal_rep IS '法人公司';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_emp_data_v.legal_rep_hid IS '法人公司HID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_emp_data_v.emp_dept_oid IS '员工部门关系OID';

    job_cate_oid varchar(36) NOT NULL, -- 岗位类OID

    status varchar(50) NULL, -- 状态
    enable_date timestamp NULL, -- 生效日期
    disable_date timestamp NULL, -- 失效日期

);

CREATE TABLE md_org_legal_rep_org_v (
    legal_rep_oid varchar(36) NOT NULL, -- 法人公司OID
    dimension_id varchar(36) NULL, -- 维度ID
    legal_rep_hid varchar(36) NULL, -- 法人公司HID
    status varchar(50) NULL, -- 状态
    ebs_val_set_type varchar(64) NULL, -- EBS值集类型
    ebs_legal_rep_code varchar(64) NULL, -- EBS法人公司Code
    ebs_legal_rep_name varchar(200) NULL, -- EBS法人公司名称
    ebs_inv_org_code varchar(64) NULL, -- EBS库存组织CODE
    ebs_inv_org_name varchar(200) NULL, -- EBS库存组织名称
    ebs_ou_code varchar(64) NULL, -- EBS业务实体OU CODE
    ebs_ou_name varchar(200) NULL, -- EBS业务实体OU名称
    enable_date timestamp NULL, -- 生效日期
    disable_date timestamp NULL, -- 失效日期
    ou_org_id varchar(36) NULL, -- 业务实体ID
    is_mfg_org varchar(1) NULL, -- 是否制造组织
    is_pur_org varchar(1) NULL, -- 是否采购组织
    CONSTRAINT md_org_legal_rep_org_v_pkey PRIMARY KEY (legal_rep_oid)
);
COMMENT ON TABLE md_org_legal_rep_org_v IS '法人组织主数据';

-- Column comments

COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_legal_rep_org_v.legal_rep_oid IS '法人公司OID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_legal_rep_org_v.dimension_id IS '维度ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_legal_rep_org_v.legal_rep_hid IS '法人公司HID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_legal_rep_org_v.status IS '状态';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_legal_rep_org_v.ebs_val_set_type IS 'EBS值集类型';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_legal_rep_org_v.ebs_legal_rep_code IS 'EBS法人公司Code';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_legal_rep_org_v.ebs_legal_rep_name IS 'EBS法人公司名称';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_legal_rep_org_v.ebs_inv_org_code IS 'EBS库存组织CODE';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_legal_rep_org_v.ebs_inv_org_name IS 'EBS库存组织名称';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_legal_rep_org_v.ebs_ou_code IS 'EBS业务实体OU CODE';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_legal_rep_org_v.ebs_ou_name IS 'EBS业务实体OU名称';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_legal_rep_org_v.enable_date IS '生效日期';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_legal_rep_org_v.disable_date IS '失效日期';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_legal_rep_org_v.ou_org_id IS '业务实体ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_legal_rep_org_v.is_mfg_org IS '是否制造组织';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_legal_rep_org_v.is_pur_org IS '是否采购组织';


-- md_org_post_v definition

CREATE TABLE md_org_post_v (
    post_oid varchar(36) NOT NULL, -- 职位OID

    post_name varchar(300) NULL, -- 职位名称
    job_oid varchar(36) NULL,
    job_hid varchar(36) NULL,
    job_name varchar(300) NULL, -- 岗位名称
    job_level varchar(32) NULL, -- 岗位层级
    dept_hid varchar(36) NULL, -- 部门HID
    job_cate_oid varchar(32) NULL, -- 岗位类OID
    enable_date timestamp NULL, -- 生效日期
    disable_date timestamp NULL, -- 失效日期
    upd_time timestamp NULL, -- 更新时间
    CONSTRAINT md_org_post_v_pkey PRIMARY KEY (post_oid)
);
COMMENT ON TABLE md_org_post_v IS '职位主数据';

COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_post_v.job_name IS '岗位名称';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_post_v.job_level IS '岗位层级';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_post_v.dept_hid IS '部门HID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_post_v.job_cate_oid IS '岗位类OID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_post_v.enable_date IS '生效日期';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_post_v.disable_date IS '失效日期';
COMMENT ON COLUMN md_org_post_v.upd_time IS '更新时间';

-- serialno_doc definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE serialno_doc;

CREATE TABLE serialno_doc (
    id varchar(32) NOT NULL, -- 主键
    doc_no varchar(128) NOT NULL, -- 流水号编码标识
    "name" varchar(128) NOT NULL, -- 流水号名称
    app_id varchar(64) NULL, -- 创建流水号系统应用id
    crt_user varchar(64) NOT NULL, -- 创建人
    crt_name varchar(64) NULL, -- 创建人名
    crt_time timestamp NOT NULL, -- 创建时间
    crt_host varchar(128) NOT NULL, -- 创建者IP
    upd_user varchar(64) NULL, -- 更新者
    upd_name varchar(64) NULL, -- 更新者名
    upd_time timestamp NULL, -- 更新时间
    upd_host varchar(128) NULL, -- 更新者IP
    tree int2 NULL DEFAULT 0, -- 是否树形  0:非树形  1:树形
    used int2 NULL DEFAULT 0, -- 是否已经被使用 0:未使用  1:已使用
    is_enabled int2 NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, -- 是否有效 0-有效   1-无效
    is_deleted int2 NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, -- 是否删除  0-未删除   1-删除
    param_unique varchar(4) NULL, -- 是否跟随传参唯一流水号
    CONSTRAINT serialno_doc_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

-- Column comments

COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_doc.id IS '主键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_doc.doc_no IS '流水号编码标识';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_doc."name" IS '流水号名称';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_doc.app_id IS '创建流水号系统应用id';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_doc.crt_user IS '创建人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_doc.crt_name IS '创建人名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_doc.crt_time IS '创建时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_doc.crt_host IS '创建者IP';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_doc.upd_user IS '更新者';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_doc.upd_name IS '更新者名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_doc.upd_time IS '更新时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_doc.upd_host IS '更新者IP';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_doc.tree IS '是否树形  0:非树形  1:树形';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_doc.used IS '是否已经被使用 0:未使用  1:已使用';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_doc.is_enabled IS '是否有效 0-有效   1-无效';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_doc.is_deleted IS '是否删除  0-未删除   1-删除';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_doc.param_unique IS '是否跟随传参唯一流水号';


-- serialno_rule definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE serialno_rule;

CREATE TABLE serialno_rule (
    id varchar(32) NOT NULL, -- 主键
    doc_id varchar(32) NOT NULL, -- 流水号主表ID
    rule_type varchar(32) NOT NULL, -- 规则类型
    rule_value varchar(128) NULL, -- 规则值
    sort_no int4 NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, -- 排序
    length int8 NULL, -- 长度
    step int4 NULL DEFAULT 1, -- 步长
    reset_type varchar(32) NULL, -- 重置类型
    crt_user varchar(64) NOT NULL, -- 创建人
    crt_name varchar(64) NULL, -- 创建人名
    crt_time timestamp NOT NULL, -- 创建时间
    crt_host varchar(128) NOT NULL, -- 创建者IP
    upd_user varchar(64) NULL, -- 更新者
    upd_name varchar(64) NULL, -- 更新者名
    upd_time timestamp NULL, -- 更新时间
    upd_host varchar(128) NULL, -- 更新者IP
    current_no int8 NULL, -- 当前流水号
    last_time timestamp NULL, -- 上次获取时间
    radix_num varchar(256) NULL, -- 进制数，多个用,隔开 年月日时分秒毫秒
    CONSTRAINT serialno_rule_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

-- Column comments

COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule.id IS '主键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule.doc_id IS '流水号主表ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule.rule_type IS '规则类型';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule.rule_value IS '规则值';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule.sort_no IS '排序';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule.length IS '长度';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule.step IS '步长';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule.reset_type IS '重置类型';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule.crt_user IS '创建人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule.crt_name IS '创建人名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule.crt_time IS '创建时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule.crt_host IS '创建者IP';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule.upd_user IS '更新者';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule.upd_name IS '更新者名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule.upd_time IS '更新时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule.upd_host IS '更新者IP';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule.current_no IS '当前流水号';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule.last_time IS '上次获取时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule.radix_num IS '进制数，多个用,隔开 年月日时分秒毫秒';


-- serialno_rule_no definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE serialno_rule_no;

CREATE TABLE serialno_rule_no (
    id varchar(32) NOT NULL, -- 主键
    rule_id varchar(32) NULL, -- 流水号id
    param_code varchar(4000) NULL, -- 参数值
    current_no int8 NULL, -- 当前流水号值
    crt_user varchar(64) NULL, -- 创建人
    crt_name varchar(64) NULL, -- 创建人名
    crt_time timestamp NULL, -- 创建时间
    crt_host varchar(128) NULL, -- 创建者IP
    upd_user varchar(64) NULL, -- 更新者
    upd_name varchar(64) NULL, -- 更新者名
    upd_time timestamp NULL, -- 更新时间
    upd_host varchar(128) NULL, -- 更新者IP
    CONSTRAINT pk_serialno_rule_no PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

-- Column comments

COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule_no.id IS '主键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule_no.rule_id IS '流水号id';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule_no.param_code IS '参数值';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule_no.current_no IS '当前流水号值';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule_no.crt_user IS '创建人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule_no.crt_name IS '创建人名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule_no.crt_time IS '创建时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule_no.crt_host IS '创建者IP';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule_no.upd_user IS '更新者';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule_no.upd_name IS '更新者名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule_no.upd_time IS '更新时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_rule_no.upd_host IS '更新者IP';


-- serialno_tree definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE serialno_tree;

CREATE TABLE serialno_tree (
    id varchar(32) NOT NULL, -- 主键
    rule_id varchar(32) NOT NULL, -- 流水号规则主表ID
    tree_level int4 NULL, -- 数层级
    length int8 NULL, -- 长度

    crt_host varchar(128) NOT NULL, -- 创建者IP
    upd_user varchar(64) NULL, -- 更新者
    upd_name varchar(64) NULL, -- 更新者名
    upd_time timestamp NULL, -- 更新时间
    upd_host varchar(128) NULL, -- 更新者IP
    CONSTRAINT serialno_tree_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_tree.id IS '主键';

COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_tree.tree_level IS '数层级';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_tree.length IS '长度';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_tree.crt_user IS '创建人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_tree.crt_name IS '创建人名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_tree.crt_time IS '创建时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_tree.crt_host IS '创建者IP';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_tree.upd_user IS '更新者';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_tree.upd_name IS '更新者名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_tree.upd_time IS '更新时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_tree.upd_host IS '更新者IP';

CREATE TABLE serialno_tree_no (
    id varchar(32) NOT NULL, -- 主键
    rule_id varchar(32) NOT NULL, -- 流水号规则主表ID
    parent_no varchar(200) NULL, -- 父编码
    current_no int8 NULL, -- 当前流水号
    last_time timestamp NULL, -- 上次获取时间
    CONSTRAINT serialno_tree_no_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

-- Column comments

COMMENT ON COLUMN serialno_tree_no.rule_id IS '流水号规则主表ID';

-- sys_business_unit definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE sys_business_unit;

CREATE TABLE sys_business_unit (
    id varchar(36) NOT NULL, -- 主键ID
    bus_unit_type varchar(10) NULL, -- 业务维度
    bus_unit_id varchar(36) NULL, -- 维度对象ID
    business_type varchar(30) NULL, -- 业务类型
    object_type varchar(36) NULL, -- 对象类别
    object_id varchar(36) NULL, -- 对象ID
    remark varchar(200) NULL, -- 备注
    is_enabled bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1'::bpchar, -- 是否有效
    is_deleted bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0'::bpchar, -- 是否删除
    sort_no int8 NULL, -- 排序标识
    attribute1 varchar(240) NULL, -- 弹性域1
    attribute2 varchar(240) NULL, -- 弹性域2
    attribute3 varchar(240) NULL, -- 弹性域3
    crt_user varchar(36) NULL, -- 创建人
    crt_name varchar(50) NULL, -- 创建人姓名
    crt_host varchar(30) NULL, -- 创建主机
    crt_time timestamp NULL, -- 创建时间
    upd_user varchar(36) NULL, -- 最后修改人
    upd_name varchar(50) NULL, -- 最后修改人姓名
    upd_host varchar(30) NULL, -- 最后修改主机
    upd_time timestamp NULL, -- 最后修改时间
    "version" numeric(22) NULL, -- 版本号
    CONSTRAINT sys_business_unit_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);
COMMENT ON TABLE sys_business_unit IS '组织/群组业务属性表';

-- Column comments

COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_business_unit.id IS '主键ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_business_unit.bus_unit_type IS '业务维度';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_business_unit.bus_unit_id IS '维度对象ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_business_unit.business_type IS '业务类型';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_business_unit.object_type IS '对象类别';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_business_unit.object_id IS '对象ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_business_unit.remark IS '备注';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_business_unit.is_enabled IS '是否有效';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_business_unit.is_deleted IS '是否删除';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_business_unit.sort_no IS '排序标识';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_business_unit.attribute1 IS '弹性域1';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_business_unit.attribute2 IS '弹性域2';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_business_unit.attribute3 IS '弹性域3';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_business_unit.crt_user IS '创建人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_business_unit.crt_name IS '创建人姓名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_business_unit.crt_host IS '创建主机';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_business_unit.crt_time IS '创建时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_business_unit.upd_user IS '最后修改人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_business_unit.upd_name IS '最后修改人姓名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_business_unit.upd_host IS '最后修改主机';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_business_unit.upd_time IS '最后修改时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_business_unit."version" IS '版本号';


-- sys_button_template definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE sys_button_template;

CREATE TABLE sys_button_template (
    id varchar(36) NOT NULL, -- 主键
    btn_code varchar(30) NOT NULL, -- 按钮编码
    btn_name varchar(30) NULL, -- 按钮名称
    btn_icon varchar(30) NULL, -- 按钮图标
    btn_type varchar(30) NULL, -- 分类
    js_event varchar(36) NULL, -- JS事件
    event_param varchar(500) NULL, -- 事件参数
    is_page_init bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0'::bpchar, -- 是否初始化按钮
    remark varchar(200) NULL, -- 备注
    sort_no int8 NULL, -- 排序码
    is_enabled bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1'::bpchar, -- 是否有效
    attribute1 varchar(240) NULL, -- 弹性域1
    attribute2 varchar(240) NULL, -- 弹性域2
    attribute3 varchar(240) NULL, -- 弹性域3
    attribute4 varchar(240) NULL, -- 弹性域4
    attribute5 varchar(240) NULL, -- 弹性域5
    attribute6 varchar(240) NULL, -- 弹性域6
    crt_user varchar(36) NULL, -- 创建人
    crt_name varchar(50) NULL, -- 创建人姓名
    crt_host varchar(30) NULL, -- 创建主机
    crt_time timestamp NULL, -- 创建时间
    upd_user varchar(36) NULL, -- 最后修改人
    upd_name varchar(50) NULL, -- 最后修改人姓名
    upd_host varchar(30) NULL, -- 最后修改主机
    upd_time timestamp NULL, -- 最后修改时间
    "version" numeric(22) NULL, -- 版本号
    CONSTRAINT sys_button_template_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);
COMMENT ON TABLE sys_button_template IS '按钮模板表';

-- Column comments

COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.id IS '主键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.btn_code IS '按钮编码';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.btn_name IS '按钮名称';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.btn_icon IS '按钮图标';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.btn_type IS '分类';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.js_event IS 'JS事件';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.event_param IS '事件参数';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.is_page_init IS '是否初始化按钮';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.remark IS '备注';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.sort_no IS '排序码';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.is_enabled IS '是否有效';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.attribute1 IS '弹性域1';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.attribute2 IS '弹性域2';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.attribute3 IS '弹性域3';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.attribute4 IS '弹性域4';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.attribute5 IS '弹性域5';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.attribute6 IS '弹性域6';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.crt_user IS '创建人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.crt_name IS '创建人姓名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.crt_host IS '创建主机';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.crt_time IS '创建时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.upd_user IS '最后修改人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.upd_name IS '最后修改人姓名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.upd_host IS '最后修改主机';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template.upd_time IS '最后修改时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_button_template."version" IS '版本号';


-- sys_dashboard definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE sys_dashboard;

CREATE TABLE sys_dashboard (
    id varchar(32) NOT NULL, -- 主键
    dashboard_name varchar(256) NULL, -- 面板名称
    dashboard_config text NULL, -- 面板配置
    dashboard_type bpchar(1) NULL, -- 面板类型
    is_public bpchar(1) NULL, -- 是否公共
    is_enabled bpchar(1) NULL, -- 是否启用
    is_deleted bpchar(1) NULL, -- 是否删除
    app_id varchar(32) NULL, -- 应用编码
    system_id varchar(32) NULL, -- 系统编码
    crt_user varchar(32) NULL, -- 创建人
    crt_name varchar(100) NULL, -- 创建人姓名
    crt_host varchar(100) NULL, -- 创建主机
    crt_time timestamp NULL, -- 创建时间
    upd_user varchar(32) NULL, -- 更新人
    upd_name varchar(100) NULL, -- 更新人姓名
    upd_host varchar(100) NULL, -- 更新主机
    upd_time timestamp NULL, -- 更新时间
    is_default bpchar(1) NULL, -- 是否默认
    allow_update bpchar(1) NULL,
    allow_deleted bpchar(1) NULL,
    CONSTRAINT pk_sys_dashboard PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_dashboard.is_deleted IS '是否删除';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_dashboard.app_id IS '应用编码';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_dashboard.system_id IS '系统编码';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_dashboard.crt_user IS '创建人';

COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_dashboard.upd_user IS '更新人';

-- sys_data_expressi definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE sys_data_expressi;

CREATE TABLE sys_data_expressi (
    id varchar(36) NOT NULL, -- 主键ID
    app_id varchar(36) NULL, -- 租户ID
    system_id varchar(36) NULL, -- 系统ID
    key_id varchar(36) NULL, -- 单据类型主键ID
    "key_type" varchar(2) NULL, -- 单据类型
    operation_type varchar(50) NULL, -- 操作类型
    begin_brackets varchar(2) NULL, -- 开始括号
    end_brackets varchar(2) NULL, -- 结束括号
    compare_oper varchar(30) NULL, -- 比较方式
    compare_oper_txt varchar(50) NULL, -- 比较方式文本
    query_value varchar(50) NULL, -- 查询VALUE
    query_txt varchar(500) NULL, -- 查询文本
    field_code varchar(50) NULL, -- 字段编码
    field_name varchar(50) NULL, -- 字段名称
    resource_field_id varchar(32) NULL, -- 资源数据类型ID
    expression_txt varchar(500) NULL, -- 表达式文本
    crt_user varchar(100) NULL, -- 创建人
    crt_name varchar(100) NULL, -- 创建人姓名
    crt_host varchar(100) NULL, -- 创建主机
    crt_time timestamp NULL, -- 创建时间
    upd_user varchar(100) NULL, -- 最后修改人
    upd_name varchar(100) NULL, -- 最后修改人姓名
    upd_host varchar(100) NULL, -- 最后修改主机
    upd_time timestamp NULL, -- 最后修改时间
    CONSTRAINT pk_sys_data_expressi PRIMARY KEY (id)
);
COMMENT ON TABLE sys_data_expressi IS 'SYS_DATA_EXPRESSI';

-- Column comments

COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_data_expressi.id IS '主键ID';

COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_data_expressi.operation_type IS '操作类型';

COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_data_expressi.end_brackets IS '结束括号';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_data_expressi.compare_oper IS '比较方式';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_data_expressi.compare_oper_txt IS '比较方式文本';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_data_expressi.query_value IS '查询VALUE';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_data_expressi.query_txt IS '查询文本';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_data_expressi.field_code IS '字段编码';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_data_expressi.field_name IS '字段名称';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_data_expressi.resource_field_id IS '资源数据类型ID';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_data_expressi.expression_txt IS '表达式文本';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_data_expressi.crt_user IS '创建人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_data_expressi.crt_name IS '创建人姓名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_data_expressi.crt_host IS '创建主机';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_data_expressi.crt_time IS '创建时间';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_data_expressi.upd_user IS '最后修改人';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_data_expressi.upd_name IS '最后修改人姓名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys_data_expressi.upd_host IS '最后修改主机';

    is_locked bpchar(1) NULL, -- 是否默认

    upd_host varchar(100) NULL, -- 更新主机
    upd_time timestamp NULL, -- 更新时间

);
```
